title: 英国のエネルギー使用量

chart.caption: The line graph shows the consumption of energy by fuel type in the UK since 1950, with projections until 2050 (quadrillion units, qu).
chart.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 320 190' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' role='img' aria-label='折れ線グラフ：燃料別エネルギー消費'><title>Energy use by fuel 1950-2050</title><line x1='40' y1='160' x2='305' y2='160' stroke='#b9b9b4'/><line x1='40' y1='20' x2='40' y2='160' stroke='#b9b9b4'/><line x1='200' y1='20' x2='200' y2='160' stroke='#ddd' stroke-dasharray='3 3'/><text x='16' y='30' font-size='9' fill='#888'>130</text><text x='20' y='163' font-size='9' fill='#888'>0</text><text x='34' y='176' font-size='9' fill='#888'>1950</text><text x='188' y='176' font-size='9' fill='#888'>2000</text><text x='285' y='176' font-size='9' fill='#888'>2050</text><polyline fill='none' stroke='#c96442' stroke-width='2.6' points='44,90 120,60 200,30 300,30'/><polyline fill='none' stroke='#9aa0a6' stroke-width='2.2' points='44,110 90,70 200,120 300,135'/><polyline fill='none' stroke='#7c9cc4' stroke-width='2.2' points='44,158 200,150 300,110'/><text x='250' y='24' font-size='9' fill='#c96442'>Petrol</text><text x='120' y='58' font-size='9' fill='#9aa0a6'>Coal & Gas</text><text x='250' y='104' font-size='9' fill='#7c9cc4'>Solar</text><text x='150' y='16' font-size='8' fill='#aaa'>← 実績 | 予測 →</text></svg>

model_paragraph: The line graph shows the consumption of energy by fuel type in the UK from 1950, with projections until 2050, measured in quadrillion units. Overall, petrol has been the dominant fuel and is projected to remain the highest, whereas coal and gas have fallen sharply since the 1970s. Petrol began at 60 units in 1950 and doubled to 130 by 2000; it is projected to remain steady until 2050. Coal and gas saw a brief uptick to 100 units in 1975 but then plunged to 50 by 2000, and are estimated to fluctuate slightly between 20 and 25 units. Meanwhile, solar energy is predicted to increase twofold by 2030.
model_paragraph_note: 自作モデル（書籍原文は不使用）

drills.jp: 石油の消費量は1950年の60から2000年までに倍増して130になった。
drills.model_en: Petrol consumption doubled from 60 units in 1950 to 130 by 2000.

drills.jp: 石油は2050年まで一定に保たれると予測されている。
drills.model_en: Petrol is projected to remain steady until 2050.

drills.jp: 石炭とガスは2000年までに50へ急落した。
drills.model_en: Coal and gas plunged to 50 units by 2000.

drills.jp: この燃料は今後20から25の間でわずかに変動すると見積もられている。
drills.model_en: This fuel is estimated to fluctuate slightly between 20 and 25 units.

drills.jp: 石炭とガスは1975年に100への一時的な急増を見せた。
drills.model_en: Coal and gas saw a brief uptick to 100 units in 1975.
